content.text: Roll the api-gateway container image tag from v2.3.1 to v2.3.2.

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: edge
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    tier: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: registry.example.com/edge/api-gateway:v2.3.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: deploy/k8s/api-gateway.yaml
@@ spec:
     spec:
       containers:
         - name: api-gateway
-          image: registry.example.com/edge/api-gateway:v2.3.1
+          image: registry.example.com/edge/api-gateway:v2.3.2
           ports:
             - containerPort: 8080
           resources:
             requests:
               cpu: "250m"
               memory: "256Mi"
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
deploy/k8s/api-gateway.yaml
